data.title: Encryption
data.description: Data in transit and at rest is encrypted using state-of-the-art cryptographic protocols.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit, AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Implementing DDoS protection mechanisms to mitigate attack vectors.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Project Shield and Cloud Armor.

data.title: User Authentication
data.description: Secure and robust authentication layers to protect user accounts.

data.title: Security Auditing
data.description: Regular security audits and penetration testing to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Engagement with cybersecurity firms and internal security teams.

data.title: Phishing Protection
data.description: Advanced AI algorithms to detect and block phishing attempts.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models and real-time threat intelligence.
